tools.name: list_research
tools.description: The full alpha402x catalog: every payable research product (empirical multibagger profiles, fiscal-year-end WACC builds, 10-Q highlight extractions) with prices, payable URLs, and free guide pages. All prices are USDC per call over x402.

tools.name: get_product_terms
tools.description: Exact x402 payment terms for one payable URL or product path (price, asset, network, payTo, scheme). The live 402 response's PAYMENT-REQUIRED header remains the authoritative terms document; this tool mirrors the same constants the gates are built from.

tools.name: check_10q_coverage
tools.description: Free coverage check against SEC EDGAR for any U.S. ticker: confirms whether 10-Q Highlights can serve it, lists available fiscal periods (newest first), and returns the payable URLs. No charge; the paid product is the extraction itself.

tools.name: how_to_pay_x402
tools.description: The x402 payment flow for these products, the client libraries that automate it, and where the authoritative terms live.
